{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Bow
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is unsure if he can use the [[Bow]] again.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is keeping the [[Bow]] in his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
